name: 智能告警修复-印尼-统一平台模板

parameters.command: ssh -p 36000 root@192.168.21.236 'echo '"'"'========== 印尼 智能告警修复平台 =========='"'"'; echo '"'"'平台目录: /root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"'; if [ ! -d '"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' ]; then echo '"'"'平台代码不存在，开始首次 clone'"'"'; git clone '"'"'https://github.com/chenjiuxuan1/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant.git'"'"' '"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' || { code=$?; echo "clone 失败，退出码: $code"; exit $code; }; else echo '"'"'平台代码目录已存在，跳过首次 clone'"'"'; fi; cd '"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' || { code=$?; echo "进入平台目录失败，退出码: $code"; exit $code; }; echo '"'"'本节点不更新代码；如需更新，请单独执行【拉取最新代码】节点'"'"'; echo "当前版本: $(git log -1 --oneline 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"; if [ -f .env.local ]; then echo '"'"'加载 .env.local'"'"'; set -a; source .env.local; set +a; else echo '"'"'未发现 .env.local，使用 n8n 内置变量'"'"'; fi; export APP_COUNTRY='"'"'ine'"'"'; export APP_WORKSPACE='"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"'; export TV_MENTIONS='"'"'gretchenhe@kn.group,riverzhai@kn.group'"'"'; export DS_API_GET_TIMEOUT_SECONDS='"'"'10'"'"'; export DS_API_GET_RETRY_COUNT='"'"'1'"'"'; export DS_WORKFLOW_LIST_PAGE_SIZE='"'"'50'"'"'; export DS_WORKFLOW_LIST_MAX_SECONDS='"'"'30'"'"'; export WORKFLOW_CODE_ROOT='"'"'/data/git/starrocks/workflow'"'"'; export WORKFLOW_CODE_COUNTRY='"'"'ine'"'"'; export REPAIR_WORKFLOW_CONFLICT_WAIT_SECONDS='"'"'300'"'"';  echo '"'"'开始执行: 智能修复'"'"'; LOCK_DIR='"'"'/tmp/intelligent_alarm_repair_ine.lockdir'"'"'; echo "并发锁目录: $LOCK_DIR"; if ! mkdir "$LOCK_DIR" 2>/dev/null; then echo '"'"'已有智能修复任务运行中，跳过本次执行'"'"'; exit 0; fi; trap "rmdir \"$LOCK_DIR\"" EXIT; python3 core/repair_strict_7step.py; code=$?; echo "执行完成，退出码: $code"; exit "$code"'

ssh -p 36000 root@192.168.21.236 'echo '"'"'========== 印尼 智能告警修复平台 =========='"'"'; echo '"'"'平台目录: /root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"'; if [ ! -d '"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' ]; then echo '"'"'平台代码不存在，开始首次 clone'"'"'; git clone '"'"'https://github.com/chenjiuxuan1/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant.git'"'"' '"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' || { code=$?; echo "clone 失败，退出码: $code"; exit $code; }; else echo '"'"'平台代码目录已存在，跳过首次 clone'"'"'; fi; cd '"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' || { code=$?; echo "进入平台目录失败，退出码: $code"; exit $code; }; echo '"'"'开始拉取最新代码'"'"'; git remote set-url origin '"'"'https://github.com/chenjiuxuan1/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant.git'"'"' || { code=$?; echo "设置远端失败，退出码: $code"; exit $code; }; git fetch origin master || { code=$?; echo "fetch 失败，退出码: $code"; exit $code; }; git reset --hard origin/master || { code=$?; echo "reset 失败，退出码: $code"; exit $code; }; echo "当前版本: $(git log -1 --oneline 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"; echo '"'"'拉取完成'"'"''

ssh -p 36000 root@192.168.21.236 'echo '"'"'========== 印尼 智能告警修复平台 =========='"'"'; echo '"'"'平台目录: /root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"'; if [ ! -d '"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' ]; then echo '"'"'平台代码不存在，开始首次 clone'"'"'; git clone '"'"'https://github.com/chenjiuxuan1/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant.git'"'"' '"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' || { code=$?; echo "clone 失败，退出码: $code"; exit $code; }; else echo '"'"'平台代码目录已存在，跳过首次 clone'"'"'; fi; cd '"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"' || { code=$?; echo "进入平台目录失败，退出码: $code"; exit $code; }; echo '"'"'本节点不更新代码；如需更新，请单独执行【拉取最新代码】节点'"'"'; echo "当前版本: $(git log -1 --oneline 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"; if [ -f .env.local ]; then echo '"'"'加载 .env.local'"'"'; set -a; source .env.local; set +a; else echo '"'"'未发现 .env.local，使用 n8n 内置变量'"'"'; fi; export APP_COUNTRY='"'"'ine'"'"'; export APP_WORKSPACE='"'"'/root/Global-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant'"'"'; export TV_MENTIONS='"'"'gretchenhe@kn.group,riverzhai@kn.group'"'"'; export DS_API_GET_TIMEOUT_SECONDS='"'"'10'"'"'; export DS_API_GET_RETRY_COUNT='"'"'1'"'"'; export DS_WORKFLOW_LIST_PAGE_SIZE='"'"'50'"'"'; export DS_WORKFLOW_LIST_MAX_SECONDS='"'"'30'"'"'; export WORKFLOW_CODE_ROOT='"'"'/data/git/starrocks/workflow'"'"'; export WORKFLOW_CODE_COUNTRY='"'"'ine'"'"'; export REPAIR_WORKFLOW_CONFLICT_WAIT_SECONDS='"'"'300'"'"';  echo '"'"'开始执行: 环境检测'"'"'; python3 tools/task_execution_checker.py --task repair; code=$?; echo "执行完成，退出码: $code"; exit "$code"'

ssh -p 36000 root@192.168.21.236 "cd /root/INE-Intelligent-Alarm-Repair-Assistant && BASE=\$(python3 -c 'from config import auto_load_env; from config.config import DS_CONFIG; print(DS_CONFIG[\"base_url\"].rstrip(\"/\"))') && TOKEN=\$(python3 -c 'from config import auto_load_env; from config.config import DS_CONFIG; print(DS_CONFIG[\"token\"])') && PROJECT=\$(python3 -c 'from config import auto_load_env; from config.config import DS_CONFIG; print(DS_CONFIG[\"project_code\"])') && curl -s \"\$BASE/projects/\$PROJECT/workflow-instances?pageNo=1&pageSize=200&stateType=ALL\" -H \"token: ${SECRET}" | python3 -c 'import sys,json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); items=data.get(\"data\",{}).get(\"totalList\",[]); hits=[x for x in items if str(x.get(\"workflowDefinitionCode\"))==\"13056261892672\"]; print(json.dumps(hits, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))'"
